since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.99%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -2.06% · Gold -1.26% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.99%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.99%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.94%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.10% at $157.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
